infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app uses the microphone for voice-to-text input when creating tasks, notes, and messages.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: This app uses speech recognition to convert your voice to text for easier communication.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to take photos for project documentation, daily reports, and progress tracking.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app accesses your photo library to attach existing photos to projects, reports, and messages.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app saves project photos and documents to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to calculate distances to job sites and provide location-based services.

plugins.photosPermission: This app accesses your photos for project documentation.
plugins.cameraPermission: This app uses the camera for project photos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: This app uses your location to calculate distances to job sites.
